ques: Locate a C++ project on GitHub that has been recently updated in the last week and has at least 500 stars, then describe its main purpose.
answer: tensorflow/tensorflow — a C++ project with ~196k stars, updated minutes ago (within the last week). Its main purpose is to serve as an open-source, end-to-end machine learning framework for building, training, and deploying machine learning and deep neural network models across many platforms (CPU/GPU/TPU), from research to production.
